title: *Teleports Behind You*
description: This mod teleports you behind the nearest player by pressing a configurable keybind
body:
## Mod: **Teleports Behind You**

**Description:**  
The *Teleports Behind You* mod does exactly what the name suggests—it teleports you behind other players! This mod is fully client-side, has a configurable keybind, and even displays the message **"Teleports behind you"** in chat (Note: this message is only visible on the client side).

### Features:
- **Client-Side Only**: Works entirely on the client without needing server modifications.
- **Configurable Keybind**: Easily set your preferred key to teleport behind players.
- **Chat Message**: Displays the message *"Teleports behind you"* when the teleport action is performed.
